hindi: प्रथमं भारती नाम, द्वितीयं च सरस्वती।
english: First name is Bharati, second is Saraswati
roman: Prathamam Bharati nama dwitiyam cha Saraswati

english: Third is Sharada Devi, fourth is the one riding the swan
roman: Tritiyam Sharada Devi chaturtham Hamsa vahini

english: Fifth is known as Jagati, sixth is Vagishwari
roman: Panchamam jagati khyata shashtham Vagishvari tatha

english: Seventh is called Kumudi, eighth is Brahmacharini
Ninth is Buddhidatri, tenth is Varadayini
Eleventh is Chandrakanta, twelfth is Bhuvneshwari
These twelve auspicious names of Saraswati
roman: Dvadashai tani namani Sarasvatyah shubhani cha

hindi: विद्यार्थी यः पठेन्नित्यं स सर्वज्ञो भवेद् ध्रुवम्॥
english: Whoever reads them daily as a student surely becomes all-knowing
roman: Vidyarthi yah pathet nityam sa sarvagno bhaved dhruvam
